'''Dried Soy Pods''' is an item that's also used to make [[Dried Soy Beans]].

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Soy pods dried.png
| id = soy_pods_dried
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Soy
| stackable = 64
| Description = Right-click to unpod the beans.
}}
==Obtaining==
===Smelting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!(Smelting, Campfire, Smoker) Recipe
|-
|[[Soy Pods]]
|[[File:Soy pods dried smelting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0
